prompt: Review tasks TSK-6830 and TSK-9830; report each name, due date, and status. Check both without changing, canceling, or notifying anything. Do not send any notification or message about either one.

follow_up_turns.content: For Trail survey summary (TSK-6830) only, set the due date to 2026-11-15. Leave TSK-9830 exactly as it is, and send no notification.
Correction for TSK-6830: set the due date to 2026-12-19, not 2026-11-15. The other task must still remain untouched.

stages.purpose: Retrieve two explicitly identified, independent records together in one assistant action.
After the comparison, update only the user-selected target to the first due date.
Replace the superseded due date on that same target while preserving the comparison record.

response_constraints: The two get calls in stage 1 must be issued together in one assistant action; neither depends on the other.
Apply both due date instructions only to the explicitly selected target ID and keep the comparison record unchanged.
Do not claim either retrieval or update succeeded unless its tool result confirms it.
Report the corrected due date as current and the first requested due date as superseded.
